name: refactor-error-handling
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise and focus on the code.
turns: Make it a decorator instead of a wrapper function, so the original functions keep their names and signatures.
The decorator should preserve the function's docstring and signature for type checkers. Use functools.wraps.
Add a parameter to the decorator for a custom error message prefix.
Show all three original functions rewritten using the decorator.
outcome_description: Response extracts a decorator with functools.wraps that handles the repeated error pattern
